title: RelBench rel-stack Dataset Preparation for JRN Estimation
summary: Demo notebook exploring the RelBench rel-stack dataset (Stack Exchange stats-exchange) prepared for Join Reproduction Number (JRN) estimation. Loads pre-computed relational metadata for 7 tables (4.2M rows), analyzes 11 FK join statistics (fan-out distributions, coverage, cardinality ratios), examines 8 multi-hop join chains with cumulative cardinality for JRN compounding analysis, reviews 5 task definitions, and visualizes key relational statistics in a 4-panel figure. Mini demo data includes 35 diverse examples across all 7 tables with full metadata.
